# CWE-640: Weak Password Recovery Mechanism for Forgotten Password (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-640-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"time"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"golang.org/x/crypto/bcrypt"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type User struct {
	ID       uint
	Email    string
	Password string
}

type ResetToken struct {
	Email     string
	Token     string
	ExpiresAt time.Time
}

// Safe: requires a single-use, time-limited reset token before changing the password.
func ForgotPassword(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	var body struct {
		Email       string `json:"email"`
		Token       string `json:"token"`
		NewPassword string `json:"new_password"`
	}
	if err := c.BindJSON(&body); err != nil {
		c.Status(http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	var tok ResetToken
	if err := db.Where("email = ? AND token = ? AND expires_at > ?", body.Email, body.Token, time.Now()).First(&tok).Error; err != nil {
		c.Status(http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	hash, _ := bcrypt.GenerateFromPassword([]byte(body.NewPassword), bcrypt.DefaultCost)
	db.Model(&User{}).Where("email = ?", body.Email).Update("password", string(hash))
	db.Delete(&tok)
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
